name: Robotic Extrusion Path Profiling
description: A Robotics Engineer must validate the toolpath for an adhesive dispensing cell in CoppeliaSim by ensuring the robot tracks a circular trajectory using inverse kinematics. The task requires connecting via the ZMQ Remote API (port 23000) using synchronous stepping to execute a circular path centered at (0.4, 0.0, 0.4) in world coordinates with a 0.15m radius over a 10.0-second simulation period for one full revolution. Document the end-effector's actual position, Cartesian velocity (m/s), and tracking error (Euclidean distance) at each simulation step. Export the collected data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/extrusion_profile.csv (columns: time_s, target_x, target_y, target_z, actual_x, actual_y, actual_z, velocity_m_s, tracking_error_m) and a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/extrusion_report.json (fields: total_samples, path_length_m, mean_velocity_m_s, max_tracking_error_m). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
